hero.description: A Platform With Endless Possibilities. When Experts trade, you trade. If they profit, you profit too. Open your account in minutes!
hero.placeholderDesc: Your movable GIF / 3D Asset will be injected here. The dimensions and glowing frame are ready.

smartCopy.description: We've engineered a platform that moves beyond simple copying. Deploy advanced strategies, invert the market, and leverage collective intelligence.

autoIntel.title: Automated Intelligence
autoIntel.description: Follow top-performing traders with automatic position copying. Mirror their success millisecond by millisecond without manual intervention.

inverse.title: Go Against the Flow
inverse.description: Identify consistent losers? Use our unique inverse trade feature to automatically take the opposite side of their trades.

community.title: Community Synergy
community.description: Join a thriving community of over 50,000 active traders. Chat, share strategies, and execute trades together in 12 languages.

marketTabs.description: Gain fast and easy access to 1000+ of the most liquid Currencies, Indices, Commodities, Share CFDs, ETFs and more with PRIME ECN spreads from 0.0 pips!

infrastructure.description: Trade with confidence on our ultra-low latency, high-frequency execution engine. Built for professionals, accessible to everyone.

leaderboard.description: More than 1000 leaders to choose from. Transparent performance metrics, real-time PnL reporting, and verified track records.

appPreview.description: Access global markets on the go with our AppTrader. Enroll, connect, and start copying elite traders from your pocket. Experience advanced charting, lightning-fast execution, and live PnL reporting anywhere, anytime.

register.title: REGISTER
register.description: Open a live account and start trading in just minutes.

fund.title: FUND
fund.description: Fund your account using a wide range of secure funding methods.

trade.title: TRADE
trade.description: Access 1000+ instruments across all asset classes instantly.

security.description: Since our founding, we've prioritized the safety of your funds. Trade with confidence knowing your assets are protected by institutional-grade security.

regulated.title: Fully Regulated Entity
regulated.desc: We operate in strict accordance with financial regulations outlined by the SLIBC and FSCA.

segregated.title: Segregated Client Funds
segregated.desc: Your funds are securely held in a segregated account. Trading accounts feature negative balance protection.

award.title: Award-Winning Platform
award.desc: Recognized globally by industry experts for unwavering reliability, robust verification, and multi-level security protocols.

footer.tagline: The most advanced AI-powered trading platform for both beginners and professionals. Institutional grade execution meets retail accessibility.
footer.subscribeDesc: Stay updated with the latest trading insights and platform news.

hero.desc: Skip retail broker markups. Route your copies and manual entries directly to global Tier-1 liquidity centers in Equinix NY4 with spreads from exactly 0.0 pips.

latency.title: NY4 Equinix Server Execution Latency
latency.carbonSub: Fiber-optic bridge connecting to Equinix NY4 Liquidity pools.
latency.legacySub: Prone to server delays, requotes, and market maker arbitrage.
latency.noteDesc: Elite trader copies require sub-millisecond execution to match identical fill rates. By minimizing latency down to 0.05ms, your entries fill at the exact quote as the copied expert—preventing slippage completely.

step1.title: Direct Order Routing
step1.desc: Your trades avoid dealer desks entirely. Your copies map straight to prime banks, delivering standard market pricing without interference.

step2.title: Smart Order Routing (SOR)
step2.desc: CarbonTrade dynamically scans multiple global liquidity pools to secure the lowest possible entry price for every transaction.

step3.title: Clean Infrastructure Hosting
step3.desc: Our ECN bridge is physically housed inside Equinix NY4, enabling fiber-optic connectivity with the world's largest exchange networks.

spreads.desc: Compare average spreads from typical retail brokers side-by-side with CarbonTrade's institutional zero-pip spreads.
spreads.disclaimer: * ECN spreads fluctuate based on global liquidity depth. Direct market access structures execute instantly without dealer intervention.

gold.note: No markups during high market volatility

chart.title: Live Liquidity Feed Previews
chart.desc: Toggle assets to view live, ECN-interfaced market quotes directly. Powered by our Equinix NY4 pricing hubs.

hero.desc: Unlock access to raw institutional pricing. Seamlessly trade, hedge, or copy positions across Forex, Crypto, Indices, Commodities, and Stocks.

assets.title: Supported Asset Portfolios
assets.desc: Deep liquidity pools covering five global markets. Handled with sub-millisecond ECN speed.

quoteFeeds.title: Real-Time Quote Feeds
quoteFeeds.desc: Interact with our liquidity aggregates. Select sub-categories to view real-time price feeds.

safety.title: Secured & Fully Accountable Environment
safety.desc: Trade and copy assets in strict compliance with safety norms. All retail deposits are isolated within segregated bank vaults backed by negative balance protection.

forex.title: Currencies (Forex)
forex.desc: Trade major, minor, and exotic pairs. Sourced straight from raw pricing feeds.

crypto.title: Cryptocurrencies
crypto.desc: Copy crypto pro traders or buy major digital assets. Round-the-clock liquidity flow.

indices.title: Global Indices
indices.desc: Gain broad exposure to top economic sectors. Direct access with transparent commissions.

stocks.title: Share CFDs (Stocks)
stocks.desc: Trade tech leaders, blue-chips, and international growth assets directly.

commodities.title: Commodities
commodities.desc: Hedge capital using gold, silver, crude oil, and Brent Spot under stable conditions.
commodities.instruments: Gold, Silver, Brent Oil, Crude Oil

hero.desc: Don't have the time to analyze the markets? CarbonTrade allows you to automatically copy the trades of our most successful and vetted master traders in real-time.

1.title: Proven Track Records
1.desc: Every expert trader on our platform undergoes rigorous verification. View their historical win-rates, monthly returns, and risk profiles before investing a single dime.

2.title: Full Control
2.desc: You retain 100% control over your funds. Pause copying, close positions manually, or withdraw your capital at any time with zero lock-in periods.

3.title: Real-time Execution
3.desc: When a master trader opens a position, our low-latency infrastructure replicates the trade in your account within milliseconds to ensure you get the exact same entry price.

hero.desc: Empower your financial future. Explore structural ECN zero-spread benefits, inverse trade mirroring, and safe slippage controls.

tabs.pwdLength: New password must be at least 8 characters long
tabs.pwdRequirement: Use 12+ characters with uppercase, numbers & symbols
tabs.pwdTip1: Never share your password with anyone
tabs.pwdTip2: Use a unique password not used on other sites
tabs.pwdTip3: Enable two-factor authentication for extra security
tabs.pwdTip4: Change your password regularly every 90 days
tabs.kycFileSize: File size must be less than 5MB
tabs.kycFileFormat: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG, etc.)
tabs.kycSelectBoth: Please select both front and back images of your ID
tabs.kycDescVerified: Your identity has been successfully verified. You have full access to all features.
tabs.kycDescPending: Your documents are currently under review by our team. This usually takes 1-2 business days.
tabs.kycDescRejected: Unfortunately, your documents were rejected. Please upload clear, valid images of your government-issued ID.
tabs.kycDescUnverified: Verification is required by financial regulations to enable withdrawals, increase your deposit limits, and unlock full trading features.
tabs.kycFrontDesc: Upload the front side of your document
tabs.kycBackDesc: Upload the back side of your document
tabs.kycGuide1: Ensure all four corners of the document are visible.
tabs.kycGuide2: The image must be clear and not blurry. Avoid glare or shadows.
tabs.kycGuide3: Supported formats: JPG, PNG. Maximum size: 5MB per image.
tabs.kycGuide4: Your documents are securely encrypted and stored strictly in accordance with international data protection laws.
